economic_notes: Council operates Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership as government business enterprises. Large portfolio investments of $477.6M including cash/short-term investments, fixed income securities, mutual funds and equities. 10-year grant with ISC (New Funding Relationship) effective April 1, 2019 to March 31, 2029. Fiber to the Home project underway ($14M WIP).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations — Council did not complete analysis of ARO liabilities (asbestos removal, arena decommissioning, salt storage site restoration, lagoon restoration, sewage infrastructure removal). Province is Ontario (Cornwall, ON address). Council also straddles Ontario/Quebec border. Subsidiary consolidated: Akweks:kowa Corp. GBEs on modified equity basis: Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership. Very large portfolio investments ($477.6M) relative to operations — Council holds Dundee Land Claim settlement funds. ISC deferred revenue is $75.2M. Segment schedules referenced as 2022 and 2021 in index (likely mislabeled — should be 2024 and 2023). Pension expense $3,501,494 (defined contribution, max 9%). Infrastructure & Housing expenses listed separately from social services in segments.
